Featured image: The Trump administration’s mass purge of federal workers may imperil efforts to keep lamprey at bay in the Great Lakes. Some 14 workers devoted to lamprey control work have been fired, and a hiring freeze has created a shortage of dozens more. (Courtesy of Great Lakes Fishery Comm.)

The Great Lakes contain 90% of our surface fresh water. Sea lamprey invasion has been an ecological disaster. Trump's mass firings removed dozens of workers focused on lamprey control. www.bridgemi.com/michigan-env...

Sea lamprey nearly wiped out the Great Lakes fishery in the 1900s, and are only kept in check today through annual chemical treatments in hundreds of rivers. Dozens of workers focused on lamprey control were among federal workers fired www.bridgemi.com/michigan-env... via .com
